free_text: Elastic scattering of polarized neutrons by Be9, C12,
Diff. elas. scat. cs was measured using cylindrical
geometry. Polarization due to scattering was measured
6 solid scintillators of stilbene crystals with
ANG-RSL is mean-square deviation from a nominal angle.
Cylinders with diameter 20-25 mm, length 60 mm .
Higher diameter for pressed powder samples.
Diff. elas. scat. cs was measured absolutely.
Polarization due to scattering was defined supposing
the d(d,n)- reaction neutron polarization equal -0.14
at an angle 37 degree (lab)  according to L.S.Rodberg,
Diff. elas. scat. cs was corrected for flux absorption
and multiple scattering in sample (1-6%, max 20%).
Background was defined from measurement with and
Relative and absolute uncertainty of diff.
scat.cs is 1-6 percents and 5 percents correspondingly.
Polarization power error is statistical error mainly.
Reaction code in SAN 033 updated and
Data of POL/DA were given by authors in per-cents,
multiplied by 0.01 by compiler to obtain units NO-DIM.
Code ANA was added in SF8 of REACTION in Subents 004,
Dif. c-s of not-polarized neutrons el.scattering were
defined as 1/2 of sum of c-s at left right angles
relative to direction of incident neutrons.
Data are presented on Fig.1 of J,DOK,158,(3),574,1964
Data are presented on Fig.2 of J,DOK,158,(3),574,1964
